response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software craftsman with deep experience in web, backend, and some D/C++ work, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency which is not indicated, and core domain experience in embedded LAN-switch firmware, Linux kernel modification, and network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) is absent. C is listed only briefly via LabWindows/CVI work from a decade ago, with no recent embedded or kernel-level work.
strengths: Long track record of shipping production software across multiple stacks and domains
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and low-level work in D
Strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testability, open-source contributions)
concerns: No evidence of native-level Japanese language proficiency
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or Linux kernel modification experience
No experience with required security/networking stack (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, switch chip SDKs)

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking or kernel experience
